title: My Dove, My Beautiful One
content:
My dove, my beautiful one,
    Arise, arise!
    The night-dew lies
    Upon my lips and eyes.

    The odorous winds are weaving
    A music of sighs:
    Arise, arise,
    My dove, my beautiful one!

    I wait by the cedar tree,
    My sister, my love,
    White breast of the dove,
    My breast shall be your bed.

    The pale dew lies
    Like a veil on my head.
    My fair one, my fair dove,
    Arise, arise!
meaning:
James Joyce's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "My Dove, My Beautiful One"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
